g.text: ## Sizeof = ~2740 bytes Primary orchestrator for ABI-compliant function generation.
CodeEmitter*, args: int, locals: int): FunctionCompiler*
FunctionCompiler*, target: void*, args: int*, count: int): int
FrameLayout*, args: int, locals: int, spills: int): void

ul.li: Solid Arrow: Direct ownership (member struct or pointer)
Dashed Arrow: Reference or cross-module interaction
